욥기 14:1.content: “Man, who is born of a woman, is of few days, and full of trouble.

욥기 14:2.content: He grows up like a flower, and is cut down. He also flees like a shadow, and doesn’t continue.

욥기 14:3.content: Do you open your eyes on such a one, and bring me into judgment with you?

욥기 14:4.content: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean? Not one.

욥기 14:5.content: Seeing his days are determined, the number of his months is with you, and you have appointed his bounds that he can’t pass;

욥기 14:6.content: Look away from him, that he may rest, until he accomplishes, as a hireling, his day.

욥기 14:7.content: “For there is hope for a tree if it is cut down, that it will sprout again, that the tender branch of it will not cease.

욥기 14:8.content: Though its root grows old in the earth, and its stock dies in the ground,

욥기 14:9.content: yet through the scent of water it will bud, and sprout boughs like a plant.

욥기 14:10.content: But man dies, and is laid low. Yes, man gives up the spirit, and where is he?

욥기 14:11.content: As the waters fail from the sea, and the river wastes and dries up,

욥기 14:12.content: so man lies down and doesn’t rise. Until the heavens are no more, they will not awake, nor be roused out of their sleep.

욥기 14:13.content: “Oh that you would hide me in Sheol, that you would keep me secret until your wrath is past, that you would appoint me a set time and remember me!

욥기 14:14.content: If a man dies, will he live again? I would wait all the days of my warfare, until my release should come.

욥기 14:15.content: You would call, and I would answer you. You would have a desire for the work of your hands.

욥기 14:16.content: But now you count my steps. Don’t you watch over my sin?

욥기 14:17.content: My disobedience is sealed up in a bag. You fasten up my iniquity.

욥기 14:18.content: “But the mountain falling comes to nothing. The rock is removed out of its place;

욥기 14:19.content: The waters wear the stones. The torrents of it wash away the dust of the earth. So you destroy the hope of man.

욥기 14:20.content: You forever prevail against him, and he departs. You change his face, and send him away.

욥기 14:21.content: His sons come to honor, and he doesn’t know it. They are brought low, but he doesn’t perceive it of them.

욥기 14:22.content: But his flesh on him has pain, and his soul within him mourns.”
